name: FirstGroup plc
description: FirstGroup plc is a leading private sector transport operator in the United Kingdom. The company provides essential public transport services through its First Bus division, one of the UK's largest bus operators, and its First Rail division, which operates major passenger rail franchises and open access services including Avanti West Coast, Great Western Railway, South Western Railway, Hull Trains, and Lumo. FirstGroup is committed to supporting the transition to a zero-emission transport system and delivering reliable, sustainable, and high-quality services for its passengers and communities.
